Surname.jp: お金大好き傭兵レンジャー

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52451_0]</color> chance to increase the target's <color=#28d9ed>Ultimate Skill cooldown</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52451_0]</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>필살기 쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52451_0]</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>必殺スキルのターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>増加させる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52451_0]</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>必杀技冷却时间</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52453_0]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52453_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52453_0]</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52453_0]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52453_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52453_0]ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52453_0]</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52453_0]回合</color>。
